blended.narrative: Copper Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,957 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 27".
